description: SurveyIQ Integration — Gap detection, survey assembly, unlock engine, question UI

tasks.title: Gap Detection and Survey Assembly Service
tasks.prompt:
Implement Gap Detection & Survey Assembly (M4.10) in the Intelligence Service.

Note: SurveyIQ is an external service. For local development, mock the SurveyIQ API with a simple stub that returns predefined survey structures.

Add endpoints:
  GET /api/intel/questions — get pending questions for current user (max 3). The gap detection logic:
    1. Analyze user's intelligence profile for gaps (missing data categories, unconfirmed public signals, low-confidence items)
    2. Prioritize by: gap_weight × answer_ease × unlock_value
    3. Generate question objects: type (confirm_data/confirm_relationship/estimate_value), prompt text, choices, unlock description
    4. Store as QPEND# items in snapp-intel
    5. Return top 3 by priority

  POST /api/intel/questions/{questionId}/answer — record answer. Store QANS# item. Trigger unlock processing.

  GET /api/intel/questions/progression — get progression stats (total answered, total unlocks, streak, last answered)

For now, generate questions locally (no actual SurveyIQ call). The question types:
- confirm_data: 'We see you're at {address} — is this current?' (Boolean)
- confirm_relationship: 'Do you know {name}, who practices nearby?' (Boolean)
- estimate_value: 'Is your annual revenue closer to...' (SingleChoice with bands)

Integration tests: create user with intelligence gaps, verify questions generated, answer questions, verify progression updates.
tasks.done_when: Gap detection generates relevant questions. Answers recorded. Progression tracked. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Unlock Engine
tasks.prompt:
Implement the Unlock Engine (M4.11) in the Intelligence Service.

When a question is answered (triggered by POST /api/intel/questions/{id}/answer):

1. Map the answer to intelligence rewards based on question type:
   - confirm_data (address confirmed): unlock market profile for that geography → create/update MKT# access, store UNLOCK# record
   - confirm_relationship (knows person): add relationship edge (store in snapp-tx as a lightweight connection record), store UNLOCK# record
   - estimate_value (revenue band selected): update PDATA# with new data, recompute confidence, unlock the cohort benchmark for that band → store UNLOCK# record

2. Each unlock produces:
   - UNLOCK# record in snapp-intel: type, description, intelligence revealed
   - Updated confidence score
   - Update PROG# progression (increment counters, update streak)

3. Return the unlock details in the answer response so the UI can show immediate feedback.

Integration tests: answer each question type, verify corresponding unlock created, verify confidence increased, verify progression updated.
tasks.done_when: Unlocks fire on each answer type. Confidence increases. Progression tracks. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Question UI and Progression
tasks.prompt:
Implement Question UI (M4.12) using MudBlazor.

1. Components/Intelligence/QuestionCard.razor:
   - MudCard with subtle highlight border
   - MudCardHeader: MudIcon Lightbulb + 'Quick question to unlock insights'
   - MudCardContent: MudText with question prompt
   - For Boolean: MudButtonGroup (Yes/No)
   - For SingleChoice: MudRadioGroup with choices
   - MudCardActions: MudButton 'Answer' + MudButton Variant=Text 'Skip'
   - On answer: MudAlert Severity=Success with unlock description, animate in

2. Embed QuestionCard in Dashboard (/intelligence):
   - Show top question card below the hero section if pending questions exist
   - After answering, fade out card, show next question or 'All caught up!' message

3. Components/Intelligence/ProgressionIndicator.razor:
   - MudChip group: '{N} insights unlocked' + '{N} day streak'
   - Placed in dashboard header area
   - MudTooltip with breakdown

4. Update notification digest template to include one question (if pending) with clickable answer links (signed URLs that call the answer endpoint directly).

5. bUnit tests.
tasks.done_when: Question cards render in dashboard. Answering shows unlock feedback. Progression indicator works. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Sprint 10 integration validation
tasks.prompt: Validate Sprint 10. Run all tests. Walkthrough: view dashboard with question card, answer questions of each type, verify unlocks appear, verify progression increments, verify confidence score rises. Write .claude/reports/sprint-10-validation.md.
tasks.done_when: All tests pass. Gamified question flow works end-to-end. Validation report written.
